Frequently Asked Questions

Is marlbot detectable by Psyonix?

marlbot runs locally and simulates human input patterns. We maintain strict safety protocols to minimize detection risk.

Can I use this in ranked matches?

marlbot Pro and SSL versions support ranked simulation. We recommend using training modes for skill development.

What platforms are supported?

Currently marlbot supports PC (Steam/Epic). Console support is in development.

Do you offer refunds?

Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with your purchase.
